meta.source: ONS Wealth & Assets Survey Round 8 + fitted Pareto tail

figures.label: Total private household wealth (GB)
figures.note: Great Britain only; excludes Northern Ireland.

figures.label: Share held by the wealthiest 1%
figures.note: The survey undercounts the top; fiscal-data adjustment more than doubles their measured share.

figures.label: Share held by the wealthiest 0.1%
figures.note: Survey figure is a Pareto extrapolation of the ONS tail; fiscal-data (WID) puts it far higher — the gap IS the hidden wealth at the very top.

figures.label: Share held by the wealthiest 10%
figures.note: Computed from ONS aggregate wealth by decile.

figures.label: Share held by the least wealthy 50%
figures.note: About the same slice the wealthiest 1% hold.

figures.label: Wealth Gini (GB households)
figures.note: Income Gini is ~0.36 — wealth is far more concentrated.
